assumptions: The system already has a 'saved prompts' collection/structure to store predefined prompts
The v3 PDF-to-exercise conversion endpoint already exists and can be extended
There is an existing admin interface where this prompt selection can be added
The exercise generation and verification phases are separate steps in the v3 flow
review_questions: Should the prompt selection UI be a modal, dropdown, or inline selection?
What is the exact mechanism to ensure the selected prompt is excluded from the verification phase?
Are there any existing prompt-related endpoints or hooks that should be reused?
